label: Transparent bachelor button motif
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Bachelor Button transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create a complete bachelor button flower motif isolated on a removable chroma-key background.
Subject: An indigo-blue bachelor button flower with fringed petals, subtle silver highlights, green stem and leaves, straw meadow undertones, and crisp botanical detail.
Chroma-key background: perfectly flat solid #ff00ff background for removal, no shadows, gradients, texture, watermark, or text.
Constraints: no cornflower confusion, no vase, no hand, no landscape.

label: Light-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Bachelor Button light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a comprehensive light-mode shadcn/tweakcn board named Morphous Bachelor Button, derived from indigo petals, silver highlights, meadow green, and straw neutrals.
Required visible sections: palette, typography, Japanese typography, components, navigation, dashboard/data, forms, tables, command/search, status states, texture, radius, spacing, shadow, tokens, and asset examples.
Style: compact notes system with 8px radii, note cards, search, metadata, dense tables, and readable labels.

label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Bachelor Button dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a dark-mode translation of Morphous Bachelor Button with indigo actions, silver dividers, straw highlights, meadow-green states, and compact notes workflow coverage.
Required visible sections: dark mode palette, typography, Japanese typography, components, navigation, dashboard/data, forms, tables, command/search, status states, texture, radius, spacing, shadow, tokens, and asset examples.
